ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of participation (e.g., JR-3, SO-2) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "event_specialization" TEXT /* Events the athlete specializes in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "university" TEXT /* University the team is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meets" (
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet or competition */,
  "meet_date" TEXT /* Date when the meet occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meet took place */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the meet (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the athlete in the meet */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the performance (e.g., time, distance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete's statistics */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the athlete */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points per meet */,
  "best_performance" INTEGER /* Best performance points */,
  "number_of_meets" INTEGER /* Number of meets participated in */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_statistics_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistics */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "average_points" REAL /* Average points per meet */,
  "best_performance" INTEGER /* Best performance points */,
  "number_of_meets" INTEGER /* Number of meets participated in */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athlete, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete whose data is being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
